case_title: ALLAN SCHWARTZ VS. LET AMERICA VOTE, INC. ET AL.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SCHWARTZ, ALLAN AS TO DEFENDANT LET AMERICA VOTE, INC. KANDER, JASON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-03-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
FILED REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL OF DEFENDANTS LET AMERICA VOTE AND JASON KANDER. FILED BY DEFENDANT LET AMERICA VOTE, INC. KANDER, JASON AS TO PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ, ALLAN
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100.00 - SERVED MAY-30-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KANDER, JASON
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 100.00 SERVED MAY-31-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LET AMERICA VOTE, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ALLAN SCHWARTZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT'S ARE NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE DISMISSED THIS MATTER W/O PREJUDICE FROM THE BENCH CITING PLAINTIFF'S SERVICE CAN NOT EXTEND OUT OF STATE IN THIS TYPE OF CASE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY SCHWARTZ, ALLAN
